source: synthetic TestAnchorA signer cert (Task #43a gen_synthetic_fixtures output); mirrors the original DIIA QES leaf layout byte-for-byte
notes: contentOffset = first ASCII byte of the serialNumber value inside the leaf cert DER.
contentLength = 16 (TINUA- prefix + 10 ASCII digits; mirrors the DIIA RNOKPP layout).
limbsLE64 pack the 16 content bytes as 4×uint64 LE, zero-padded.
Post-#43a: asciiValue is the synthetic TestAnchorA stable-ID. Szafir (PL) and EE-Test (EE) remain deferred per lead.
